svg.title: Cross-site scripting risk assessment
svg.desc: An example risk assessment showing medium likelihood, medium impact, and medium overall risk for XSS.
svg.text: user interaction or a specific page flow.
Medium because XSS can steal sessions,
deface pages, or execute browser actions.
Likelihood: medium when exploitation requires user interaction or a specific rendering path.
Impact: medium because XSS can still lead to session theft, defacement, or browser-side actions.
Risk: medium, which should be addressed after higher-risk issues.
